text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You could try hanging your alarm clock around
your neck before bed. That way you'll never
oversleep!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Not a chance. It'll look like a cowbell.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
She has a point, Bamboo! I think what she really
needs is a big grandfather clock!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, no. I really don't need any of these.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I know I suck at mornings 'cause of work, and I let
it affect practice... but that's a me problem.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! What kind of disciplinary committee
chair and roommate would I be if I didn't try to
help!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And I cannot overlook this as class rep!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll just turn the alarm volume all the way up, 'kay?
